steps.prompt: The clock has numbers all the way around. Can you find number 1? Tap it on the clock!
There is 1! Watch the big hand — it swept round to 1. What number comes after 1? Find number 2 and tap it!
2 comes after 1. The numbers go around and around the clock! Now find number 3 — keep going around!
3 comes after 2. 1, 2, 3 — the clock is counting! Skip ahead — find number 6. It is right at the bottom of the clock.
6 is at the very bottom. Halfway around! The numbers have been going all the way from 1. Now find the biggest number on the clock — number 12. It is right at the top!
steps.feedback: 12 is at the top — that is where the clock always starts. 1, 2, 3 all the way to 12. That is how a clock counts!
